arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk escapes red card for Richarlison elbow - and then brutally trolls opponent
arts.sum: Referee Craig Pawson opted not to take any action after Virgil van Dijk appeared to stick an elbow into the face of Richarlison during their Carabao Cup semi-final clash, with VAR also sticking with his on-field decision

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk leaves fans in stitches as he tricks Richarlison during battle with the Tottenham forward in Liverpool's Carabao Cup semi-final clash
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk left fans in stitches as he tricked Richarlison during Liverpool's Carabao Cup semi-final clash with Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Moment Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk escapes red card despite appearing to ELBOW Richarlison in Carabao Cup semi-final against Tottenham
arts.sum: Van Dijk caught the Tottenham forward with a stray arm as they pair tussled for the ball in the second minute at Anfield, with Richarlison seeing holding his face after an apparent elbow.

arts.ttl: Former teammate tips Liverpool star to join one of Barcelona or Real Madrid this summer
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two leading clubs have this week been tipped as potential landing spots for Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk. This comes amid mounting speculation, pointing towards what would mark…

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher compares Ryan Gravenberch to Premier League legend and claims 'revelation' should be in contention for player of the year award
arts.sum: The Reds are taking on Spurs in the semi-final second leg of the Carabao Cup, trailing by one going into the game yet still favourites to overturn the deficit and set up a final against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: The £66m sum that shows why Tottenham Hotspur should be all in on Europa League
arts.sum: While the money from the Europa League will go a little way to easing some of the pain caused by a lack of Champions League football, the revenue comparison with Europe’s biggest competition shows the potential for rivals to pull away from Spurs, with Arsenal’s return to the Champions League stage having seen them leapfrog Tottenham from 10th into seventh when it comes to total revenue in the recently-published Deloitte Football Money League. Carabao Cup triumphs don’t yield huge financial gains either, with the prize pot for winning the competition just £100,000 in the final, with the biggest gains for clubs coming from matchday revenue for any home games they have along the way.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez starts as Alisson absence explained for Liverpool against Tottenham
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool XI for the showdown with Spurs in the League Cup semi-final at Anfield

We’ve made two changes to the team that started at Brentford on Sunday as new signing Kevin Danso comes straight in for his debut in the heart of our defence. Substitutes: Austin, Pedro Porro, Reguilon, Cassanova, Bergvall, Olusesi, Ajayi, Moore, Tel.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel was ready to join Marseille before choosing Premier League move
arts.sum: According to a report from RMC Sport journalist Fabrice Hawkins, Mathys Tel (19) was at one stage ready to join Olympique de Marseille during the winter transfer window. Marseille had…

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Tottenham: Carabao Cup semi-final, second leg – live
arts.sum: Carabao Cup semi-final, 8pm GMT kick-off (first leg 0-1) Live scoreboard | Read the latest edition of Football Daily Read Jacob Steinberg’s preview Fresh from overseeing a dogged 2-0 win against Brentford on Sunday, Postecoglou sat down and spoke for 43 minutes before a moment that could define his time in north London. The head coach considered the chance for Spurs “to make a big impact” by going to Anfield and building on their 1-0 win in the first leg. He thought about his captain, Son Heung-min, still being trophyless after nearly 10 years at the club. He seemed energised by sealing deals for the centre-back Kevin Danso and the French forward Mathys Tel at the end of a difficult transfer window. The tie will go to extra time if necessary, then penalties There’s no away goals rule VAR is being used Continue reading...
